featureSections.title: Elegant Trim Work for Every Room

featureSections.cardBody: Our trim work adds the perfect finishing touch to any room.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?

servicesPage.intro: At Zetino Carpenter Inc, we offer a full range of carpentry services to enhance your home or business. From custom built-ins to structural framing, our skilled team delivers quality workmanship on every project.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Design and build custom cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.longDescription: Our custom cabinetry service is tailored to your specific needs. We work with you to design cabinets that maximize storage and complement your decor. Using premium materials and expert joinery, we create pieces that last a lifetime.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget.

process.title: Design
process.description: We create detailed plans and 3D renderings.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs your cabinets with precision.

faqs.question: How long does custom cabinetry take?
faqs.answer: Most projects take 4-6 weeks from design to installation.

faqs.question: What materials do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer solid wood, plywood, and MDF options.

services.title: Trim & Molding
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of baseboards, crown molding, and more.
services.longDescription: Enhance your home's interior with expertly installed trim and molding. Our services include baseboards, crown molding, chair rails, wainscoting, and custom millwork. We ensure seamless joints and perfect miters for a polished look.

process.title: Measure & Plan
process.description: We measure your space and recommend molding profiles.

process.title: Cut & Fit
process.description: Precision cutting and fitting for seamless installation.

process.title: Finish & Caulk
process.description: We sand, caulk, and paint for a flawless finish.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate existing profiles or create custom designs.

faqs.question: Do you paint the trim?
faqs.answer: We can install primed or pre-finished trim, and we offer painting services.

services.title: Custom Built-ins
services.shortDescription: Built-in shelving, entertainment centers, and home office solutions.
services.longDescription: Maximize your space with custom built-in furniture. We design and build bookshelves, entertainment centers, window seats, and home office units that fit your exact specifications. Our built-ins are crafted to blend seamlessly with your home's architecture.

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We assess the space and discuss your storage needs.

process.title: Custom Fabrication
process.description: We build the unit in our workshop for precision.

faqs.question: Can you build around existing features?
faqs.answer: Yes, we custom-fit built-ins around windows, doors, and sloped ceilings.

faqs.question: What finishes are available?
faqs.answer: We offer paint, stain, or natural wood finishes.

services.title: Framing & Structural Carpentry
services.shortDescription: Residential and commercial framing, decks, and structural repairs.
services.longDescription: Our framing and structural carpentry services provide the backbone for your construction projects. We handle new home framing, additions, deck construction, and structural repairs. Our team ensures everything is square, level, and built to code.

process.title: Blueprint Review
process.description: We review plans and identify material needs.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: We source quality lumber and hardware.

process.title: Framing & Inspection
process.description: We frame the structure and pass all inspections.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain necessary permits and schedule inspections.

faqs.question: Can you frame a deck?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We build decks with pressure-treated lumber or composite materials.

about.headline: Craftsmanship You Can Trust
about.mission: To provide high-quality carpentry services that exceed expectations, using premium materials and expert techniques.
story: Zetino Carpenter Inc was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: deliver exceptional carpentry to the Mesquite community. Starting with small trim projects, we built a reputation for precision and reliability. Over the years, we've expanded to offer full-service carpentry, including custom cabinetry, built-ins, and structural framing.

Our team takes pride in every project, treating each home as if it were our own. We believe in honest communication, transparent pricing, and meticulous attention to detail. Whether it's a simple repair or a complete renovation, we bring the same level of dedication to every job.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only the best materials and techniques.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is done with care.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? Call or fill out the form below.
